summary.en: Kazakhstan is a full EAEU member, so in-scope corded tools, chargers, adapters, and external power supplies are assessed under TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage equipment safety and placed on the market with EAC marking after accredited declaration or certification. The Kazakhstan grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz, which is a genuine nominal match with China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, but the matching voltage does not replace the EAEU conformity route.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦是 EAEU 正式成员，因此适用范围内的有线工具、充电器、适配器和外置电源按 TR CU 004/2011 低压设备安全进行评定，并在认可声明或认证后以 EAC 标志投放市场。哈萨克斯坦电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 标称基础是真实匹配，但电压匹配不能替代 EAEU 合格评定路径。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦是 EAEU 正式成員，因此適用範圍內的有線工具、充電器、適配器和外置電源按 TR CU 004/2011 低壓設備安全進行評定，並在認可聲明或認證後以 EAC 標誌投放市場。哈薩克斯坦電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 標稱基礎是真實匹配，但電壓匹配不能替代 EAEU 合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAC declaration or certification through accredited conformity-assessment bodies
GOST IEC 60745 series or GOST IEC 62841 series as harmonized technical routes for power tools

summary.en: China files commonly rely on GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 power-tool safety testing and CCC where applicable. The nominal voltage and frequency are aligned with Kazakhstan, but China test reports and CCC status must still be mapped into the EAEU technical file and EAC conformity procedure.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常依赖 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 电动工具安全测试及适用时的 CCC。标称电压和频率与哈萨克斯坦一致，但中国测试报告和 CCC 状态仍须映射到 EAEU 技术文件及 EAC 合格评定程序。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常依賴 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 電動工具安全測試及適用時的 CCC。標稱電壓和頻率與哈薩克斯坦一致，但中國測試報告和 CCC 狀態仍須映射到 EAEU 技術文件及 EAC 合格評定程序。

standards_or_laws: CCC where applicable for China domestic market access

gap.en: The technical voltage fit is favorable, but the regulatory gap remains EAC evidence: China GB or CCC evidence does not by itself authorize Kazakhstan market placement under TR CU 004/2011.
gap.zh: 技术电压匹配有利，但监管差距仍是 EAC 证据：中国 GB 或 CCC 证据本身不能授权按 TR CU 004/2011 在哈萨克斯坦投放市场。
gap.zht: 技術電壓匹配有利，但監管差距仍是 EAC 證據：中國 GB 或 CCC 證據本身不能授權按 TR CU 004/2011 在哈薩克斯坦投放市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope low-voltage electrical equipment; EAC declaration or certification is required before Kazakhstan market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 and CCC where applicable support China domestic compliance but do not replace Kazakhstan EAC conformity.

source.publisher: Adilet Legal Information System of Regulatory Legal Acts of the Republic of Kazakhstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China electrical safety evidence as reusable test input only; the Kazakhstan release file still needs TR CU 004/2011 coverage, an accredited EAEU conformity route, and EAC marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国电气安全证据仅作为可复用测试输入；哈萨克斯坦放行文件仍需要覆盖 TR CU 004/2011、完成认可的 EAEU 合格评定路径并加贴 EAC 标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國電氣安全證據僅作為可複用測試輸入；哈薩克斯坦放行文件仍需要覆蓋 TR CU 004/2011、完成認可的 EAEU 合格評定路徑並加貼 EAC 標誌。
